_comment: Mapbox GL JS layer configuration for CityLens parcel scoring heatmap. Copy these into your React/Mapbox setup.

layers._comment: Fill-extrusion layer: parcels colored and extruded by score
Flat fill layer (alternative to 3D, for 2D map views)
Score label layer (visible at high zoom)

react_example._comment: Example React/Mapbox GL JS integration code — see below

initial_view._comment: Center on Waterloo, Ontario with a slight pitch for 3D effect
